creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
- upgrade x11/xfce4-clipman-plugin to 1.0.2
- sort pkg-plist
- remove old email address from pkg-descr

Changelog at http://goodies.xfce.org/releases/xfce4-clipman-plugin/ChangeLog

Patch tested on both 7.2R/i386 and 7.2R/amd64 :
* runtime
* port test
* 6/7/8 tinderbox 2009-06-16

Note the addition of @dirrmtry share/locale/ur_PK lines in pkg-plist, should this eventually be added to mtree?

Fix: 

If approved, I'll commit the patch at ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsd/xfce4-clipman-plugin.diff
